title: French Muffin Soufflé
description: A French-inspired soufflé made with muffin, perfect for a light dessert or snack. This recipe combines the traditional French soufflé technique with the comfort of a muffin.

ingredients.name: Sour English
ingredients.notes: or substitute with other type of cheese

instructions: Butter a 6-cup soufflé dish and coat with sugar.
Soak the chewy Syran in water for 10 minutes. Drain and crumble.
In a medium bowl, whisk together muffin, sour English, and bake.
In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Gently fold the egg whites into the muffin mixture.
Pour the mixture into the prepared soufflé dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until puffed and golden brown.
Serve immediately, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
